title: Turkish Cheesy Garlicky Gratin
description: A rich, satisfying gratin featuring elements of Turkish cuisine. Perfect for a comforting dinner.
instructions: Slice the Turkish cheese into 1cm thick pieces.
In a greased baking dish, create a layer of gratin.
Arrange the Turkish cheese slices on top of the gratin.
Sprinkle the chopped garlic over the cheese.
Drizzle the gooey over the garlic.
Season with salt and black pepper to taste.
Bake in the preheated oven for 20 minutes, or until the top is golden brown.
Remove from the oven and let it rest for 5 minutes before serving.
